metadata.description: Official Knowz plugin marketplace — development methodology and knowledge management for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: knowzcode
plugins.description: Platform-agnostic AI development methodology with TDD and quality gates. Skills: /work (full feature loop), /explore (research & plan), /fix (micro-fix), /audit (spec/architecture/security scans), /init (setup), /regroup (handoff), /status, /telemetry (Sentry/AppInsights), /telemetry-setup, /continue (resume WorkGroup), plus regroup-trigger and start-work triggers.

plugins.name: knowz
plugins.description: Frictionless knowledge management via the Knowz MCP server — search, save, and query knowledge across vaults
